title: nixStats
description: A configurable sidebar HUD that tracks any Minecraft stat — blocks mined, items used, mob kills, distances, time played, and more — all in one glanceable overlay.
body:
nixStats adds a compact, fully configurable sidebar HUD to your game that lets you track any stat Minecraft records — right on screen while you play.

Features
- Track anything: phantom timer, blocks mined, items used/crafted/broken/picked up/dropped, entities killed or killed by, and all general stats (counts, distances, time-based)
- Add as many stats as you want and reorder them freely
- Two-column table layout — label and value columns size dynamically to their content
- Large numbers auto-abbreviated (1.2K, 4.5M, etc.)
- Time-based stats (play time, sneak time, time since death, etc.) display as H:MM:SS
- Phantom timer color-coded by urgency with configurable warning/critical thresholds

Config
- Open with /nixstats config or bind a key in Options → Controls → nixStats
- Sidebar title, position (drag to reposition), HUD scale, text scale, column padding
- Per-stat icon pulled automatically from the item/entity registry
- Font toggle (Default / Uniform)
- Multiplayer stat sync interval
